specific_question: What was Elexion Automotive's total production capacity across North American manufacturing facilities in 2024, and how has this changed since 2023
answer: In March 2024, Elexion Automotive discloses that its total production capacity across all North American manufacturing facilities reached 127,000 vehicles annually, which represents a 15% increase from the 110,500 vehicle capacity in 2023.
dr_question: What impact would a 20% increase in dealer-led customer education on EV infotainment and connectivity features have on reducing service visit frequency by 2027?
